description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped piece of cheese with a pale yellow to light greenish hue, featuring several dark, irregularly shaped holes or eyes scattered across its surfaces. The cheese has a smooth, slightly matte exterior with subtle color variations, including hints of blue-green and brown, suggesting a semi-aged or specialty variety. The edges are cleanly cut, and the overall form is geometric, resembling a block that has been sliced from a larger wheel. The holes are unevenly distributed, with some deeper and more pronounced than others, adding to the naturalistic appearance. There is no visible rind or outer coating, and the cheese appears solid throughout. The object is unadorned, with no visible branding or packaging, and is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A wedge-shaped, pale yellow cheese with dark holes and a smooth, matte surface. The cheese has no visible rind or packaging and features natural color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, flat face of the cheese with three prominent dark holes and subtle greenish-yellow color gradients.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the pointed edge of the wedge, with two visible holes and a more pronounced transition between the top and side surfaces.
description_view_2: The top surface is most visible here, showing a smoother area with fewer holes and a lighter yellow coloration.
description_view_3: This view displays the largest flat side, featuring several dark holes and a more uniform yellow-green color with some blueish patches.
